backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining types (Customer, Job, Appointment, Estimate) and CRUD operations for customer management, job tracking, appointment scheduling, and estimate generation with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: customer search filtering, PDF export from EstimatesPage, PDF export from SavedEstimatesPage, and PDF export from CustomerDetailPage.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and configuration with details about routing, authentication, customer management, calendar, jobs, and estimates functionality.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives and custom CSS variables defining OKLCH color system for light and dark themes including primary, secondary, accent, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag, page title 'Phoenix Shield Mold Removal Business App', and script tag loading the React application from main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for customers, calendar, jobs, dashboard, social media, estimates, saved estimates, and follow-ups, plus authentication protection and theme provider.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button component using Internet Identity with loading states, query cache clearing on logout, and error handling for authentication edge cases.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog for first-time user profile setup that appears after authentication if no profile exists, with name input form and proper loading state handling.
frontend/src/components/calendar/Appoint: Modal dialog component that displays read-only appointment details including customer name, date, time, duration, and job type with icons.
Form dialog component for creating appointments with customer selection, date/time pickers, job type input, and duration field; pre-fills date if provided.
frontend/src/components/calendar/Monthly: Monthly calendar grid view component that displays appointments on dates, supports navigation between months, and handles clicks on dates and appointments.
frontend/src/components/customers/Custom: Card component displaying customer information (name, phone, email, address, job count) with hover effects and click handler.
Form dialog component for creating or editing customers with fields for name, phone, email, and physical address; supports loading states.
frontend/src/components/followups/Messag: Card component for editing and previewing message templates with copy-to-clipboard functionality, reset option, and live preview of template text.
frontend/src/components/jobs/JobCard.tsx: Card component displaying job details (service type, date, customer, issues) with a status dropdown that updates job status via mutation.
frontend/src/components/jobs/JobForm.tsx: Dialog form component for creating new jobs with fields for customer selection, service date, service type, and issues found. Handles form submission by converting dates to BigInt timestamps and calling the createJob mutation.
frontend/src/components/jobs/JobHistoryT: Displays a chronological timeline of jobs for a specific customer, showing service type, date, status badge, and issues found. Shows loading skeletons or empty state when no jobs exist.
frontend/src/components/jobs/JobStatusBa: Renders a colored badge component for job status (completed, in progress, scheduled) with appropriate styling for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Main navigation header with logo, desktop nav menu, mobile sheet menu, and login button. Includes navigation items for customers, calendar, jobs, dashboard, social media, estimates, saved estimates, and follow-ups.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Root layout wrapper component that includes the header, main content area, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution and copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/social/ContentCa: Displays a monthly calendar grid showing scheduled social media posts with day numbers, post titles, and platform badges. Highlights the current day.
frontend/src/components/social/PostGener: Form component for generating social media posts with inputs for topic, tone (professional/friendly/urgent), and platform. Uses templates to generate platform-specific content after a simulated delay.
frontend/src/components/social/PostPrevi: Editable preview component for generated social media posts with character count, copy-to-clipboard functionality, and a mock platform preview showing how the post would appear.
frontend/src/components/social/TemplateL: React component that displays a library of pre-written social media post templates for mold remediation business, including categories like Before/After, Prevention Tips, Testimonials, Emergency Response, and Seasonal Content.
frontend/src/data/messageTemplates.ts: Defines message templates for customer follow-ups including post-job satisfaction checks, 6-month prevention reminders, seasonal check-ins, and Google review requests with timing recommendations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the Internet Computer actor instance, handling authentication with Internet Identity and initializing access control with admin tokens.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient configuration for ICP integration.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for CRUD operations on user profiles, customers, jobs, appointments, estimates, and materials, using the ICP actor for backend communication.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining the Phoenix Shield brand color palette (dark blue primary, lime green accent) for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Calendar page component that displays a monthly calendar view with appointments, handles appointment creation via a form modal, and shows appointment details when clicked.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDetailPage.ts: Displays detailed customer information including contact details, estimates, and job history timeline. Provides functionality to copy estimates to clipboard and generate PDF downloads.
frontend/src/pages/CustomersPage.tsx: Lists all customers with search/filter functionality and allows adding new customers via a form. Displays empty state when no customers exist and navigates to customer detail on card click.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Shows business metrics dashboard with monthly revenue, completed jobs count, and average job value calculated from job data. Displays a mascot character image alongside the statistics.
frontend/src/pages/EstimatesPage.tsx: Provides an estimate calculator with square footage pricing, material line items, and labor costs. Supports saving, loading, copying to clipboard, and generating PDF estimates.
frontend/src/pages/FollowUpsPage.tsx: Displays pre-defined message templates for customer follow-ups with copy functionality. Shows tips for personalizing and using templates effectively.
frontend/src/pages/JobsPage.tsx: Lists jobs with tabbed filtering by status (all, scheduled, in-progress, completed). Includes job creation form and displays empty states for each tab.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Landing page with hero background image, company logo, branding text, and login button. Serves as the authentication entry point for the application.
frontend/src/pages/SavedEstimatesPage.ts: Displays a grid of saved estimates with actions to edit, delete, copy to clipboard, and download as PDF; includes loading states and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/SocialMediaPage.tsx: Tabbed interface for social media management with AI post generator, content calendar, template library, and post preview components; displays Phoenix Shield mascot.
frontend/src/utils/copyEstimate.ts: Formats estimate data (square footage, materials, labor) as plain text and copies it to the clipboard.
frontend/src/utils/generateEstimatePDF.t: Generates a styled HTML-based PDF document for estimates with company branding, customer info, line items, and totals; triggers browser print dialog.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH, extended typography, container queries, animations, and shadcn/ui design tokens.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining Phoenix Shield as a mold remediation business management app with Internet Identity auth, CRM, estimates, scheduling, social media tools, and Phoenix Shield branding.
